Description: Inspection checklist development — comprehensive checklist organized by discipline covering all systems and contractual requirements
Notes: PM prepares and confirms checklist with site supervisors; cross-references IFC drawings and commissioning reports

Description: Proponent self-inspection — walkthrough of all portions of the Work against checklist with deficiency identification and severity classification
Notes: Includes deficiency logging and remediation coordination; re-walk of remediated items

Description: Readiness confirmation — review deficiency log and confirm commissioning completion and Safety Code inspection closure and as-built verification
SourceSection: Step 3 — Confirm Readiness for Owner Inspection
Notes: Requires written commissioning confirmation from DEL-020-01 and County PM alignment

Description: Written inspection request — formal written letter to Owner requesting final inspection
SourceSection: Step 4 — Submit Written Request for Final Inspection
Notes: Includes project reference and completion statement and coordination contact

Description: Owner final inspection facilitation — coordinate and attend Owner inspection with County project representative present
Notes: Record all Owner observations; provide access to all areas and documentation; distribute inspection report

Description: Deficiency documentation and remediation management — compile deficiency log from Owner inspection and coordinate remediation within 10-day timeline
SourceSection: Step 6 — Document and Remediate Inspection Deficiencies
Notes: Includes severity classification and re-inspection records and Owner approval tracking

Description: CCC procurement — confirm compliance with Owner and obtain signed Construction Completion Certificate
Notes: Record CCC issuance date as guarantee period start; forward to DEL-020-03

Description: Consolidated inspection outcome summary — aggregated record of self-inspection results and Owner findings and deficiency status and CCC decision
SourceSection: Step 8 — Produce Consolidated Inspection Outcome Summary
Notes: Forward to DEL-020-03 for closeout documentation package

Description: Downstream notification and closeout — notify DEL-020-03 and confirm deficiency holdback status and file all records
SourceSection: Step 9 — Notify Downstream and Close Out DEL-020-02
Notes: Continue monitoring outstanding deficiencies until holdback released

Description: Project Manager — inspection coordination and deficiency documentation and CCC issuance oversight
Construction Project Manager — construction oversight during final inspection phase
Site Superintendent — field leadership and site condition verification during inspection
Cost Estimator — deficiency holdback value estimation support
QA/QC Lead — quality verification and inspection checklist review
HSE Manager — safety compliance verification during final inspection
Document Controller — inspection records and correspondence and CCC filing and closeout documentation
Commissioning Agent — commissioning completion confirmation and functional testing verification for final inspection support
